title: Services people in South Korea often compare for a Netherlands move
intro: Apostille and translation planning, Seoul embassy timing, MVV steps, transfers, housing, insurance, and mobile—aligned with long-stay permit routes.

items.reason: Map apostille paths when South Korea–issued documents feed into IND or gemeente procedures.
Plan sworn translations when Dutch, English, French, or German versions are required.
Organise civil and sponsor documents before MVV submission.
Build a phased checklist with ?from=south-korea context.
Sequence BSN, banking, and insurance after arrival.
Move KRW and EUR with transparent pricing for deposits and living costs.
Digital Dutch banking often used soon after BSN and address.
Traditional Dutch banking option some employers and landlords recognise easily.
Short and mid-term listings while you search for a long-term rental.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.
Dutch SIM options after you land.
